description: Incoming supplier invoice (TVA autoliquidation). Born-digital PDF, text-regex extraction. Match anchors are structural (generic invoice vocabulary), never a party name — this repo is public.

validation.comment: TVA autoliquidation: no TVA/TTC line on this layout, so no sum check applies — only the HT presence is required. The absent sum rule is the template's honest statement, not a gap.
